overview: Professional multi-department website for Assirik Tours, a Senegalese company based in Dakar. Features public-facing pages for Travel, Real Estate, and Cleaning (ATN) departments with contact/quote forms, and a protected admin dashboard to manage all submissions.
features: Fixed header with mobile hamburger menu and brand navigation
Hero section with animated headline and department overview cards
Voyages page: flight booking, visa assistance, circuits, airport transfers, hotel reservations
Immobilier page: property sales, rentals, management, investment advisory
Nettoiement (ATN) page: 8 cleaning service domains with quote form
Contact page with embedded map, full address, and general inquiry form
Protected admin dashboard with Internet Identity login, filters by department, and status management
AOS.js scroll animations and hover effects throughout
Responsive design with navy, sky blue, and gold color palette
Motoko backend storing all form submissions with public write / admin-only read
